metadata.name: Umbra Armor — Hyena Umbra saves Llanowar Elves from Doom Blade
metadata.description: Tests CR 702.89a (Umbra armor replacement effect). p1 casts Hyena Umbra ({W}) targeting their Llanowar Elves (1/1). Hyena Umbra resolves and attaches, granting the Elves +1/+1 and first strike. p1 passes priority. p2 casts Doom Blade ({1}{B}) targeting Llanowar Elves. During Doom Blade resolution the DestroyPermanent effect checks for umbra armor: Hyena Umbra is on the battlefield attached to Llanowar Elves and has KeywordAbility::UmbraArmor, so apply_umbra_armor fires. All damage on Llanowar Elves is cleared and Hyena Umbra is moved to p1's graveyard (GameEvent::UmbraArmorApplied). The 'continue' in the effect executor skips the actual destruction of Llanowar Elves. Final state: Llanowar Elves remains on p1's battlefield; Hyena Umbra is in p1's graveyard; the +1/+1 continuous effect and first strike grant from Hyena Umbra are gone (Aura no longer on battlefield, CR 613.5).
metadata.generation_notes:
Hyena Umbra card definition (crates/engine/src/cards/defs/hyena_umbra.rs): mana_cost {W} (white:1), Enchantment—Aura, abilities: [Keyword(Enchant(EnchantTarget::Creature)), Static{ModifyPower(1), AttachedCreature, WhileSourceOnBattlefield}, Static{ModifyToughness(1), AttachedCreature, WhileSourceOnBattlefield}, Static{AddKeyword(FirstStrike), AttachedCreature, WhileSourceOnBattlefield}, Keyword(UmbraArmor)]. Llanowar Elves: 1/1 Elf Druid, {T}: Add {G}. Doom Blade oracle: 'Destroy target nonblack creature.' Llanowar Elves is green (nonblack) — valid target (CR 115.4).

Umbra armor replacement is handled in two places in the engine: (1) Effect::DestroyPermanent in effects/mod.rs (lines 581-591) — for destroy effects from spells, which is the path used here; (2) the SBA lethal-damage path in rules/sba.rs. For Doom Blade, check_umbra_armor is called during Effect::DestroyPermanent execution. If auras are found, apply_umbra_armor runs: clears damage_marked and deathtouch_damage on the creature, moves the Aura to its owner's graveyard, emits GameEvent::UmbraArmorApplied, and continues to skip the destruction of the creature. The creature stays on the battlefield. The replacement fires during stack_resolve for Doom Blade, not as a separate SBA after.

P/T assertion gap: The harness does not support zones.battlefield.p1.<card>.power assertions. The +1/+1 grant and first strike loss after Hyena Umbra leaves the battlefield (CR 613.5: continuous effects end when their source leaves the battlefield) are verified by unit tests in enchant.rs and layers.rs, not in this script. The script confirms correctness via zone state: Hyena Umbra in graveyard, Llanowar Elves on battlefield, Hyena Umbra excluded from battlefield.

Initial state reasoning: p1 needs {W} to cast Hyena Umbra. p2 needs {1}{B} to cast Doom Blade. Turn is set to 3 to imply prior land drops occurred (mana already in pool; land_plays_remaining 0). The Aura cast step uses a 'permanent' target (not 'player') identical to the Rancor Aura cast in script 062.

script.step_note: p1 casts Hyena Umbra targeting Llanowar Elves. Both pass priority. Hyena Umbra resolves and attaches.

actions.description: Initial: Llanowar Elves on p1 battlefield; Hyena Umbra in p1 hand; Doom Blade in p2 hand; stack empty
actions.note: p1 has {W} in pool ready to cast Hyena Umbra. Llanowar Elves is on the battlefield — it will be the Aura's enchant target.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Hyena Umbra; {W} paid from pool. CR 702.5a: Enchant creature — Llanowar Elves (a creature) is a valid target.

actions.description: After casting: Hyena Umbra on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Hyena Umbra is on the stack targeting Llanowar Elves. Llanowar Elves is unaffected while the spell is on the stack.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Hyena Umbra resolves (CR 608.2).

resolution.note: CR 303.4b: Hyena Umbra enters the battlefield attached to Llanowar Elves. attached_to set; AuraAttached event emitted.
CR 613.4c (layer 7c): +1/+1 P/T modification registered for Llanowar Elves (two separate ModifyPower/ModifyToughness effects). CR 702.7a (layer 6): first strike keyword granted to Llanowar Elves.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Hyena Umbra resolves as an Aura permanent, enters battlefield attached to Llanowar Elves.

actions.description: After Hyena Umbra resolves: both Hyena Umbra and Llanowar Elves on p1 battlefield; stack empty
actions.note: Hyena Umbra entered battlefield attached to Llanowar Elves. Llanowar Elves now has +1/+1 (2/2) and first strike in layer calculations — P/T assertion not directly supported by harness; verified by unit tests.

script.step_note: p1 passes priority. p2 casts Doom Blade targeting Llanowar Elves. Doom Blade resolves: umbra armor replacement fires during DestroyPermanent execution — Hyena Umbra is destroyed instead and Llanowar Elves is saved.

actions.note: CR 116.3a: After Hyena Umbra resolved, p1 (active player) received priority. p1 passes so p2 may act.
CR 601.2: p2 casts Doom Blade; {1}{B} paid. Llanowar Elves is green (nonblack) — valid target (CR 115.4).

actions.description: Doom Blade on stack; Doom Blade left p2 hand; Llanowar Elves and Hyena Umbra still on battlefield
actions.note: Doom Blade is on the stack. Llanowar Elves and Hyena Umbra are still on the battlefield awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Doom Blade resolves (CR 608.2).

resolution.note: CR 702.89a: Doom Blade's DestroyPermanent effect targets Llanowar Elves. Before destroying it, the engine calls check_umbra_armor(state, llanowar_elves_id) and finds Hyena Umbra (battlefield Aura with KeywordAbility::UmbraArmor attached to Llanowar Elves). apply_umbra_armor fires: (1) damage_marked on Llanowar Elves cleared to 0; (2) deathtouch_damage flag cleared; (3) Hyena Umbra moved to p1's graveyard via move_object_to_zone; (4) GameEvent::UmbraArmorApplied emitted. The 'continue' skips the actual destruction of Llanowar Elves. The creature remains on the battlefield unharmed.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Doom Blade resolves. CR 702.89a: Umbra armor replacement fires — Hyena Umbra is destroyed instead of Llanowar Elves. Doom Blade moves to p2's graveyard.

actions.description: After Doom Blade resolves: Llanowar Elves still on p1 battlefield; Hyena Umbra in p1 graveyard (destroyed by umbra armor replacement); stack empty; Doom Blade in p2 graveyard
actions.note: CR 702.89a: Umbra armor replacement destroyed Hyena Umbra instead of Llanowar Elves. Llanowar Elves is on the battlefield with no damage marked. Hyena Umbra is in p1's graveyard — its continuous effects (+1/+1, first strike) ended when it left the battlefield (CR 613.5). Life totals unchanged. No SBAs apply: Llanowar Elves is a 1/1 with no damage (returned to base stats), and no lethal-damage SBA fires.
